insights.text: Significant service delays and slow order delivery at the JP Nagar branch
Limited parking space and challenges with valet/footpath encroachment
High noise levels during peak crowded hours
Exceptional value for money and pocket-friendly pricing
Generous portion sizes across the menu

hero.headline: Iconic Flavors, Incredible Value: Your Ultimate Comfort Food Destination
hero.subheadline: Experience the legendary burgers, creamy pastas, and indulgent desserts that have made Truffles a Bangalore favorite for generations.
hero.source: desire: Exceptional value for money and pocket-friendly pricing

items: Legendary Signature Burgers including the All American Cheese Burst
Diverse Multi-Cuisine Menu featuring Italian, American, and Fusion flavors
Indulgent Dessert Bar with decadent shakes, sundaes, and pastries
Vibrant Café Atmosphere perfect for casual hangouts and family outings
Unbeatable Value with premium quality at pocket-friendly prices

website.subheadline: Experience the legendary burgers, creamy pastas, and indulgent desserts that have made Truffles a Bangalore favorite for generations.
benefitsList: Legendary Signature Burgers including the All American Cheese Burst
Diverse Multi-Cuisine Menu featuring Italian, American, and Fusion flavors
Indulgent Dessert Bar with decadent shakes, sundaes, and pastries
Vibrant Café Atmosphere perfect for casual hangouts and family outings
Unbeatable Value with premium quality at pocket-friendly prices
testimonials: The All American Cheese Burger is an absolute showstopper—generously sized, incredibly juicy, and loaded with signature cheese.
Truffles continues to be my go-to place for brunches; it never fails to live up to expectations with great food and a relaxed vibe.
One of the best places to visit if you’re on a budget. The food is amazing, affordable, and the portions are great.
why_choose_us: Decades of culinary excellence and consistent taste
A welcoming environment for families and large groups
The perfect balance of quantity, quality, and affordability
